subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! His honor Roshan in this gathering hath been illumined by the light of the love of God even as a bright candle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق جناب روشن در این انجمن بنور محبت الله مانند شمع روشن شد حال مراجعت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
